sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63502" key="lipesa/nwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐπεσάνωρ</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾱ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n63502.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forsaker of her husband</tr_>, of Helen, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:26:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
